items.question: When is the RSVP deadline?
items.answer: Please RSVP by 15 April so we can get an accurate idea of numbers.

items.question: Can I bring a date?
items.answer: Please check your invitation to see if you have a plus one.

items.question: Are children invited?
items.answer: As much as we adore your little ones, we won’t be including them in the ceremony or reception. However, we know some of you will be travelling with your children, so they’re more than welcome at the Friday cocktail reception and Sunday brunch! We’ll also be offering a babysitting service at the venue during the ceremony if you’re unable to arrange other care. If you have any questions, just let us know!

items.question: What’s the weather going to be like?
items.answer: Welcome to Rome! You can expect warm, sunny weather—usually around 28–34°C in the day—with lovely evenings. Light clothes and plenty of water are definitely recommended.

items.question: Where can I park?
items.answer: There’s plenty of free parking close to the entrance of the venue.
